node.text: Girl please from where can I get this scarf?
@_aetherion_ I got it from a local store, if you live in Setif, dm me i will send u the location ❤️
@amagram03 I send u a msg  check yours please
Mash'allah 😔 btw you're spoiling us lastly ily😭😭💗
مش عارفه الواحد يحكي عن الاناقه ولا الالوان 😍❤️
That’s an angel……it can’t be a human being……..(Allahumma Barik)
The fact that YOU exist, girl everything is possible 🥹🫣
my first time losing a dare i just can't
